response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience as a Senior Software Developer with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js background, but his role has been more senior-level (Staff, Senior) than the entry-level Junior/Mid-Level Fullstack Developer role requires. While his skills align well technically, his depth of experience may lead to overqualification or misalignment with the junior-focused responsibilities and team structure.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript and fullstack development experience (React, Node.js, Nest.js-like backend work)
Strong background in scalable systems, APIs, and relational databases (MongoDB, SQL)
Proven ability to integrate multiple data sources and deliver pragmatic, user-focused solutions
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (10+ years as Senior/Staff Engineer)
No clear evidence of LLM/API integration or AWS/ML exposure for niche requirements
